name: 05-13-visitor-first-discovery-reduction
title: Visitor-first discovery page reduction — fewer panels, stronger signal
description: Reduce discovery page decision overload. Keep map + top 3 taverns + one clear CTA per tavern. Remove world stats, online entities, echoes, footprints from visitor view. Visitor must pick one tavern in under 10 seconds.
creator: claude
notes: Child task of 05-12-onsite-visitor-brutal-audit-issues. Issue #3: filters, emotional tags, signal state, timeline, feed, online entities, echoes, footprint, world stats compete before visitor understands why any tavern is worth entering. P2 because tavern doorway work is higher priority.
